fields.metaDescription: Low views can come from weak packaging, low impressions, or poor retention after the click. Separate CTR problems from retention problems before changing everyt

fields.newsletterCopy: Low views can come from weak packaging, low impressions, or poor retention after the click. Separate CTR problems from retention problems before changing everything.
